raise_heat_press_handle.query: a worker lifts the orange handle of the heat press and opens it
raise_heat_press_handle.prompt:
Event: a worker lifts the orange handle of the heat press and opens it
Locate this event in the 20-second video. Return exactly one JSON object: {"start_s": number, "end_s": number}. If the event is absent, return {"start_s": null, "end_s": null}. Times are seconds from video start.
